transcript: Human: I... will to learn English. I... having interview tomorrow. AI Avatar: Do you want to learn English speaking? Human: Yes. But... lekin aap Hindi mein baat kar sakte ho? [Yes. But... can you speak in Hindi?] AI Avatar: Zaroor. Aapko Angrezi seekhni hai? [Sure. Do you want to learn English?] Human: Haan, main Angrezi seekhna chahta hoon, par mere paas time aur paisa zyada nahi hai. Aur main Hindi medium se hoon. [Yes, I want to learn English, but I don't have much time or money. And I am from a Hindi medium background.] AI Avatar: MySivi try karo. Roz sirf 10-15 minute mere saath English practice karo, aur ek mahine mein aap acchi English bolne lagoge. [Try MySivi. Practice English with me for just 10-15 minutes daily, and in one month, you will start speaking good English.] Human: Isme teacher kaun hoga? [Who will be the teacher in this?] AI Avatar: Mere jaise AI teachers step-by-step English speaking sikhayenge. Galatiyan turant correct karenge aur kabhi judge nahi karenge. [AI teachers like me will teach you English speaking step-by-step. They will correct mistakes immediately and never judge.] Human: Hmm, ab yeh sahi lag raha hai. [Hmm, now this sounds right.] AI Avatar: Aaj hi MySivi app download karo. 50 lakh se zyada log roz yahan English practice karte hain. Sirf 3 rupay ke trial se shuru karo aur apni English ko next level par le jao. [Download the MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people practice English here daily. Start with just a 3-rupee trial and take your English to the next level.] Human: Abhi main phone mein download karta hoon MySivi app. [I will download the MySivi app on my phone right now.] AI Avatar: Download now.
on_screen_text: I... will to learn English. I...uh... having interview tomorrow. Do you want to learn English speaking? Yes, lekin aap Hindi mein baat kar sakte ho? Zaroor. Aapko Angrezi seekhni hai? Haan, main Angrezi seekhna chahta hoon. par mere paas time aur paisya zyada nahi hai. aur main Hindi medium se hoon. MySivi try karo. Roz sirf 10-15 minute mere saath English practice karo, aur ek mahine mein aap acchi English bolne lagoge. Isme teacher kaun hoga? Mere jaise AI teachers step by step English speaking sikhayenge. Galatiyan turant correct karenge aur kabhi judge nahi karenge. Hmm, ab yeh sahi lag raha hai. Aaj hi MySivi app download karo. 50 lakh se zyada log roj yahan English practice karte hain. Sirf 3 rupay ke trial se shuru karo aur apni English ko next level par le jao. Abhi main phone mein download karta hoon MySivi app. Download now
summary: A young man struggling with English speaking for an upcoming interview is introduced to the MySivi app by an AI avatar. The avatar explains how the app offers non-judgmental, step-by-step English practice with AI teachers for just 10-15 minutes a day. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app and start a 3-rupee trial.
